title: senecio subrubriflorus
intro: Senecio subrubriflorus is a plant species commonly known as woolly groundsel, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities. It is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to aid in the relief of these conditions.
